title: UF H&E Staining
author: Marda Jorgensen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.beamjac6
materials: Prepare staining line with reagents in order of use, based on steps three through 25. Example of a H&E stain line.

steps.title: Place slides into a xylene compatible slide rack
steps.instruction: Place slides into a xylene compatible slide rack.

steps.title: Immerse slide holder in the first...
steps.instruction: Immerse slide holder in the first xylene staining station for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Immerse slide holder in the second...
steps.instruction: Immerse slide holder in the second xylene staining station for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Remove slide holder from xylene and...
steps.instruction: Remove slide holder from xylene and transfer to the first staining station of 100% EtOH for 5 minutes. QUickly blot excess xylene from rack before transfering into ethanol.

steps.title: Transfer slide rack into the second...
steps.instruction: Transfer slide rack into the second EtOH station for an additional five minutes.

steps.title: Transfer to 95% EtOH for 3 minutes
steps.instruction: Transfer to 95% EtOH for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer to 70% EtOH for 3 minutes
steps.instruction: Transfer to 70% EtOH for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer to 50% EtOH for 3 minutes
steps.instruction: Transfer to 50% EtOH for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer to water for 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Transfer to water for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer to the second change of...
steps.instruction: Transfer to the second change of water for an additional 2 minutes. Quickly blot excess water from slide holder before going into hematoxylin.

steps.title: Transfer slides to Hematoxylin for 1 minute and 15 seconds
steps.instruction: Transfer slides to Hematoxylin for 1 minute and 15 seconds.

steps.title: Rinse in de-ionized water, and then...
steps.instruction: Rinse in de-ionized water, and then transfer slides to tap water for 30 seconds.

steps.title: After rinsing in tap water, place...
steps.instruction: After rinsing in tap water, place slide rack back into de-ionized water for 1 minute.

steps.title: Transfer to second water staining dish for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Transfer to second water staining dish for 1 minute.

steps.title: Transfer to Aqueous Clarifier for 45 seconds
steps.instruction: Transfer to Aqueous Clarifier for 45 seconds.

steps.title: Do a quick rinse in de-ionized...
steps.instruction: Do a quick rinse in de-ionized water and then transfer to tap water for 1 minute.

steps.title: Transfer to bluing reagent for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Transfer to bluing reagent for 1 minute.

steps.title: Place in water for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Place in water for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer to 80% EtOH for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Transfer to 80% EtOH for 1 minute.

steps.title: Transfer to Eosin-Y for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Transfer to Eosin-Y for 1 minute.

steps.title: Transfer to 100% EtOH for 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Transfer to 100% EtOH for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer to the second 100% EtOH station for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Transfer to the second 100% EtOH station for 5 minutes. Be sure to blot excess ethanol before going into xylene.

steps.title: Transfer to xylene for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Transfer to xylene for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Transfer to a fresh xylene station for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Transfer to a fresh xylene station for 5 minutes.

steps.title: After the second xylene change, use...
steps.instruction: After the second xylene change, use a xylene compatible mountant to affix a coverslip to the slide.
